The '''House of Cron''' was an ancient and powerful noble family from the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].

==History==
The House of Cron was the royal family that ruled the ancient [[Kingdom of Cron]] in the Tion Cluster.<ref name="MtL" /> The House already existed at the time of the [[Xim Wars]] when the head of the family, [[Duke/Legends|Duke]] [[Robeir II]], was acquainted with [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]].<ref name="XaV" /> 

The House of Cron still existed at the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN47">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|life/13314_4.html|New Xim Exhibit to Tour}}</ref> At that time, the Tion Cluster was divided in two states: the Kingdom of Cron and the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. As the latter had lost its former glory and was only known as a remote backwater region,<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> the House of Cron funded the [[Allied Tion Historical Society]] in order to promote the rich history and legacy of the Hegemony.<ref name="HNN47" />

The House of Cron still ruled the Kingdom of Cron during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].<ref name="MtL" /> However, the Kingdom became an [[Imperial client state]] after the Clone Wars and its territory was reorganized into an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] known as the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]]. The Kingdom of Cron kept a nominal independence<ref name="Xim Week" /> but its [[King of Cron|monarchs]] had to swear allegiance to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. [[Robeir XXIII]] was the King of Cron during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="MtL" />
